policies.policy_sql: CREATE POLICY "financial_reports_dev_access" ON financial_reports FOR ALL USING (is_dev_mode() OR organization_id = '90cd635a-380f-4586-a3b7-a09103b6df94');
test_queries: INSERT INTO financial_reports (id, created_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

policies.policy_sql: CREATE POLICY "financial_reports_service_access" ON financial_reports FOR ALL USING (auth.role() = 'service_role'::text);
CREATE POLICY "financial_reports_org_access" ON financial_reports FOR ALL USING (organization_id IN (SELECT organization_id FROM user_management WHERE user_id = auth.uid()));
test_queries: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM financial_reports WHERE organization_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
